marketName: Other Commercial and Service Industry Machinery Manufacturing
coreJobStatement: Manufacture and deploy water-using commercial machinery that cleans, treats, purifies, or dispenses aqueous fluids for commercial and institutional operations
hierarchy: Product VN (L7 through L4) — what subsystems compose commercial water-using machinery and their deployment ecosystem
marketSize: ~$15–20B globally (commercial laundry ~$5–10B, car wash equipment ~$2B, commercial water treatment ~$5–8B) [SRC: web_search]

vnUnits.name: Water Inlet Assembly
vnUnits.functionalJob: Solenoid-controlled inlet connecting the machine to building water supply. Typically DN15–DN25 cold and hot connections.

vnUnits.name: Water Softener
vnUnits.functionalJob: Ion-exchange system removing calcium and magnesium hardness. Critical for commercial laundry (hard water reduces detergent effectiveness 30–50%) and water treatment (protects RO membranes). [SRC: web_search]

vnUnits.name: Pre-Filtration System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Multi-stage filtration removing sediment, chlorine, and organics before the machine process. Essential for water purification (protects RO membranes) and beverage equipment (taste/quality).

vnUnits.name: Circulation Pump
vnUnits.functionalJob: Moves water through internal circuits (wash circuits, rinse circuits, recirculation loops). Low-to-medium pressure, high reliability required.

vnUnits.name: High-Pressure Pump
vnUnits.functionalJob: Generates 50–150 bar for car wash spray systems. The primary energy-consuming component in car wash equipment.

vnUnits.name: Valve Manifold & Distribution
vnUnits.functionalJob: Routes water to different machine zones/stages in the correct sequence. Solenoid valves dominate; proportional valves growing for precision dosing.

vnUnits.name: Flow Sensing & Measurement
vnUnits.functionalJob: Instruments measuring volumetric flow rate, consumption totals, and flow anomalies in the machine's water circuits. Flow data feeds controller logic for fill verification, dosing accuracy, water-use reporting, and leak detection. [SRC: web_search, ICON Process Controls]

vnUnits.name: Piping & Hose Network
vnUnits.functionalJob: Physical conduit connecting all fluid-handling components. Material selected for chemical compatibility and pressure rating.

vnUnits.name: Water Heater / Heating Element
vnUnits.functionalJob: Primary heat input to the machine's water circuit. Electric immersion dominant in washer-extractors; gas burner in large tunnel washers; steam in industrial laundry.

vnUnits.name: Heat Recovery Unit
vnUnits.functionalJob: Captures thermal energy from drain water or exhaust air to pre-heat incoming cold water. ROI typically 1–3 years in high-volume operations. [SRC: web_search]

vnUnits.name: Temperature Sensing & Control
vnUnits.functionalJob: Ensures water reaches and maintains target temperature for each cycle step.

vnUnits.name: Chemical Dispensing System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Metered injection of liquid chemicals into the wash/rinse water. Peristaltic and diaphragm pumps dominate. Key vendors: Hydro Systems, Ecolab, Diversey, SEKO. [SRC: web_search]

vnUnits.name: Rinse & Sanitiser Injection
vnUnits.functionalJob: Final-stage injection ensuring residual chemical removal and microbiological safety.

vnUnits.name: Wash Drum Assembly (Laundry)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Rotating cylinder performing mechanical wash action. Drum diameter and speed determine mechanical action (G-force). Commercial drums: 60–250 kg capacity.

vnUnits.name: Spray Arch & Wash Assembly (Car Wash)
vnUnits.functionalJob: High-pressure spray systems and mechanical wash elements in tunnel, in-bay, and self-service configurations. [SRC: web_search]

vnUnits.name: Membrane Filtration Module (Water Treatment)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Core separation technology in commercial water purification and treatment systems.

vnUnits.name: Conveyor & Material Handling
vnUnits.functionalJob: Transport systems moving vehicles (car wash tunnel) or linen (tunnel washer) through sequential process stations.

vnUnits.name: Drain Pump & Discharge
vnUnits.functionalJob: Removes used water from machine sump to building drain or recycling system.

vnUnits.name: Water Recycling System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Treats and reclaims wastewater for reuse in subsequent wash cycles. Mandatory in many car wash jurisdictions; growing in commercial laundry. [SRC: web_search]

vnUnits.name: Effluent Monitoring & Compliance
vnUnits.functionalJob: Instrumentation ensuring discharged water meets local environmental standards.

vnUnits.name: Machine Controller / PLC
vnUnits.functionalJob: Central logic unit managing cycle sequencing, sensor inputs, valve/pump outputs, and fault handling.

vnUnits.name: Human-Machine Interface (HMI)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Operator/customer-facing display and controls. Ranges from simple push-button (self-service car wash) to full touchscreen (tunnel washer, water treatment).

vnUnits.name: IoT & Connectivity
vnUnits.functionalJob: Remote monitoring, fleet management, and data analytics platform. Enables predictive maintenance and water-use optimisation. [SRC: web_search, Sierra Wireless]

vnUnits.name: Payment & Vending System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Revenue collection for vended/self-service equipment. Coin-op declining; card/mobile growing at ~15% CAGR.

vnUnits.name: Machine Safety Systems
vnUnits.functionalJob: Interlocks and protection devices preventing injury and property damage.

vnUnits.name: Regulatory Compliance
vnUnits.functionalJob: Certification, testing, and water efficiency rating programmes.

vnUnits.name: Preventive Maintenance & Aftermarket
vnUnits.functionalJob: Ongoing service, spare parts, and predictive analytics. Service revenue is 20–30% of OEM revenue for mature equipment categories.
